doctorReport.title: Health Report
doctorReport.subtitle: HealthLog — Personal Health Report
doctorReport.footerDisclaimer1: This report was generated automatically from self-tracked data and is intended to support
doctorReport.footerDisclaimer2: the doctor–patient conversation. It does not replace a medical diagnosis. Correlations do not imply causation.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry, copy the technical details, or open a bug report.

auth.passkeySetupLater: You can set up passkeys at any time in Settings.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {minLength} characters long.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your health overview
dashboard.customizeSubtitle: Choose which cards appear on your dashboard and in what order. Defaults work out of the box.

measurements.title: Measurements
measurements.subtitle: Weight, blood pressure, pulse & more
measurements.glucoseUnitHint: Stored canonically in mg/dL; display unit is your preference.
measurements.loginRequired: Please sign in to view measurements.
measurements.deleteConfirmDescription: This measurement will be permanently deleted.

mood.title: Mood
mood.subtitle: Mood tracker & entries
mood.deleteConfirmDescription: This mood entry will be permanently deleted.
mood.loginRequired: Please sign in to view mood entries.

medications.title: Medications
medications.subtitle: Medications, schedules & intake
medications.loginRequired: Please sign in to manage medications.
medications.name: Name
medications.deleteDescription: The medication and all intake records will be permanently deleted.
medications.importDescription: Paste a JSON array with intake data. Expected format:
medications.importInvalidJson: File does not contain valid JSON
medications.apiEndpointDescription: Use this endpoint to record intakes via API (e.g., iPhone Shortcut or cron job).
medications.apiTokenActiveHint: Endpoint is active. Existing tokens remain valid but cannot be shown in plain text again.
medications.apiTokenActivateHint: Activate the endpoint to create a new token.
medications.apiTokenOnceHint: The token is only shown in plain text once at creation.
medications.intakeDeleteDescription: This intake record will be permanently deleted.
medications.deleteConfirmDescription: The medication and all intake history will be permanently deleted.
medications.purgeConfirmDescription: All intake records for this medication will be permanently deleted. The medication itself will remain and start without history data.
medications.loginRequiredIntakes: Please sign in to view intakes.

charts.title: History
charts.subtitle: Visualization of your health data
charts.noData: No data in selected time range

insights.generationFailed: The analysis couldn't be generated. Please try again.
insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: AI-powered analysis of your health data
insights.overviewSubtitle: Trends, risks, progress at a glance
insights.noWeightData: No weight data or height not set.
insights.weightBpStrong: There is a strong correlation between weight and blood pressure.
insights.weightBpModerate: There is a moderate correlation between weight and blood pressure.
insights.weightBpWeak: There is a weak correlation between weight and blood pressure.
insights.weightBpNone: No discernible correlation between weight and blood pressure.
insights.notEnoughCorrelationData: Not enough data for correlation analysis.
insights.minCorrelationData: At least 5 time-matched weight and blood pressure measurements needed.
insights.bpMedContinuity: BP Medication Continuity vs. Blood Pressure (Systolic)
insights.bpMedNegative: Negative correlation: higher continuity tends to be associated with lower systolic blood pressure.
insights.bpMedPositive: Positive correlation: higher continuity tends to be associated with higher systolic blood pressure in your data.
insights.bpMedNone: No discernible correlation in your data.
insights.notEnoughMedData: Not enough data for this analysis.
insights.notEnoughMedDataHint: Tag medications as blood pressure medications and record sufficient intakes + blood pressure measurements.
insights.generalStatusNoKey: The general status cannot be generated because no OpenAI key is configured.
insights.generalStatusUnavailable: The general status is currently unavailable.
insights.bloodPressureMedicationListEmpty: No active blood pressure medication configured.
insights.bloodPressureStatusNoKey: The blood pressure summary cannot be generated because no OpenAI key is configured.
insights.bloodPressureStatusUnavailable: The blood pressure summary is currently unavailable.
insights.weightStatusNoKey: The weight summary cannot be generated because no OpenAI key is configured.
insights.weightStatusUnavailable: The weight summary is currently unavailable.
insights.pulseStatusNoKey: The pulse summary cannot be generated because no OpenAI key is configured.
insights.pulseStatusUnavailable: The pulse summary is currently unavailable.
insights.bmiStatusNoKey: The BMI summary cannot be generated because no OpenAI key is configured.
insights.bmiStatusUnavailable: The BMI summary is currently unavailable.
insights.medicationComplianceStatusNoKey: The medication compliance text cannot be generated because no OpenAI key is configured.
insights.medicationComplianceStatusUnavailable: The medication compliance text is currently unavailable.
insights.configureApiKey: Configure an OpenAI API key in Settings to get AI-powered insights.
insights.rateLimit: Please wait before generating a new analysis.
insights.noApiKey: Please add an OpenAI API key in Settings first.
insights.minMoodCorrelationData: At least 5 temporally matched mood and measurement data points required.
insights.moodBpModerate: There is a moderate correlation between mood and blood pressure.
insights.moodBpNone: No detectable correlation between mood and blood pressure.
insights.moodBpStrong: There is a strong correlation between mood and blood pressure.
insights.moodBpWeak: There is a weak correlation between mood and blood pressure.
insights.moodStatusNoKey: Mood summary cannot be generated because no OpenAI API key is configured.
insights.moodWeightModerate: There is a moderate correlation between mood and weight.
insights.moodWeightNone: No detectable correlation between mood and weight.
insights.moodWeightStrong: There is a strong correlation between mood and weight.
insights.moodWeightWeak: There is a weak correlation between mood and weight.
insights.notEnoughMoodCorrelationData: Not enough mood data for correlation analysis.
insights.generatePrompt: Click "Generate" for AI-powered insights about your health data.

thresholds.title: Personal thresholds
thresholds.subtitle: Override the computed target range for any metric. Defaults stay in effect until you set a value here.
thresholds.overrideWarning: Overriding with values outside guideline ranges may produce unhealthy targets. Only do this on doctor's advice.

onboarding.setupDescription: Set up your profile to get started. You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.medicationsDescription: Add your medications to enable reminders and compliance tracking.
onboarding.notificationsDescription: HealthLog can remind you about your medications. Configure this later in Settings.
onboarding.telegramHint: Reminders via Telegram bot with snooze buttons
onboarding.webPushHint: Browser notifications directly to your device
onboarding.notificationsLater: You can set this up anytime in Settings.
onboarding.targetsDescription: Set optional target values for blood pressure and weight.
onboarding.errorProfile: Could not save your profile. Please try again.
onboarding.errorMedication: Could not add the medication "{name}". Please try again or add it later in Medications.
onboarding.errorTargets: Could not save your target values. Please try again.
onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while finishing setup. Please try again.
onboarding.medScheduleHint: We'll add a default reminder window (08:00–09:00 daily). You can adjust it anytime in Medications.

v2.title: Welcome to HealthLog
v2.subtitle: Three quick steps. You can finish anything later from Settings.
v2.skipStep: Skip this step — you can finish setup later from Settings.

step1.title: About you
step1.description: Used for blood-pressure targets, BMI, and the right reminders.
step1.displayNameHint: Shown on the dashboard greeting and in reports.
step1.languageHint: We'll use this for the app, PDFs, and notifications.

step2.title: Log your first measurement
step2.description: Weight, blood pressure, or pulse — whatever you have right now. The dashboard comes alive with one entry.
step2.added: Got it — you can add more anytime from the dashboard.
step2.skipHint: No measurement at hand? Skip and log one when you're ready.

step3.title: Pick one notification channel
step3.description: We'll only send what you ask for. You can add more channels or fine-tune events later.
step3.channelTelegramHint: Reminders with snooze buttons inside Telegram.
step3.channelWebPushHint: Native browser notifications on this device.
step3.channelNtfyHint: Open-source push to phone or desktop, no account.
step3.channelNoneHint: I'll set up notifications later from Settings.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Quick wins to get the most out of HealthLog.
gettingStarted.restoreHint: You can restore the checklist from Settings.

items.profileDescription: Height, date of birth and gender unlock personalised targets.
items.measurementDescription: One reading is enough to draw your first trend tile.
items.medicationDescription: Track compliance and get reminders right when you need them.
items.withingsDescription: Auto-sync weight, BP and pulse from your Withings devices.
items.notificationsDescription: Choose how HealthLog should remind you — Telegram, ntfy or Web Push.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, Security & Connections
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language of the application.
settings.dateOfBirthHint: Used for automatic blood pressure target calculations.
settings.changePasswordDescription: Replace your current password with a new one.
settings.passkeysDescription: Passkeys allow secure login without a password.
settings.passkeyNotSupported: Your browser or device doesn't support passkeys yet. Try a different browser or device.
settings.passkeyAlreadyRegistered: This device is already registered as a passkey for your account.
settings.passkeySecurityBlocked: Your browser blocked the passkey request for security reasons. Make sure you're on a trusted HTTPS origin and try again.
settings.passkeyTimeout: The passkey prompt timed out. Please try again.
settings.deletePasskeyDescription: The passkey will be permanently deleted.
settings.telegramDescription: Get reminders for missed medication intake via Telegram.
settings.telegramStep1: 1. Create a bot via @BotFather in Telegram and copy the token.
settings.telegramStep2: 2. Send /start to your bot to activate the chat.
settings.telegramStep3: 3. Find your Chat ID via @userinfobot or the Bot API.
settings.ntfyAuthTokenHint: Only needed for private topics with access control.
settings.webPushDescription: Receive notifications directly in your browser, even when HealthLog is not open.
settings.webPushNotSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
settings.webPushDenied: Push notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings.
settings.webPushNotConfigured: Web Push is not configured on the server.
settings.kiInsightsDescription: Optional: Save your OpenAI key for daily, automatic AI evaluations in Insights.
settings.kiInsightsBenefit1: Daily summaries for general status, blood pressure, weight, pulse, BMI, and medication compliance.
settings.kiInsightsBenefit2: Better trend and correlation interpretation based on your latest 30 daily measurement points per area.
settings.kiInsightsBenefit3: Automatic background refresh so the Insights page always shows up-to-date assessments.
settings.apiKeyStored: Key stored — enter new one to replace
settings.codexConnected: ChatGPT connected successfully! AI insights are now active.
settings.codexConnectionFailed: ChatGPT connection failed. Please try again.
settings.rawDataOnDescription: Aggregated metrics plus anonymized raw points from the last 30 days are sent. This includes per-metric measurements (for example weight, blood pressure, pulse) with time context so AI can detect patterns, outliers, and correlations more reliably. Name, email, and direct account identifiers are not transmitted.
settings.rawDataOffDescription: Only summarized metrics are sent (for example averages, trends, minimum/maximum). No individual points and no exact time context. This is more privacy-preserving, but AI can be less precise for short-term patterns and fluctuations.
settings.rawDataWarning: Raw mode enabled: AI receives additional anonymized points from the last 30 days for higher analysis accuracy.
settings.regenerateRateLimit: Please wait — max 2 analyses per hour.
settings.withingsDescription: Connect your Withings scale and blood pressure monitors.
settings.withingsFullSyncDescription: All available Withings data will be fully synchronized. This may take some time depending on your history.
settings.withingsDisconnectDescription: The connection to Withings will be disconnected. Previously synced data will be preserved.
settings.withingsNoCredentials: Please enter your API credentials above to connect Withings.
settings.apiTokensDescription: Create API tokens for external medication intake (e.g., Shortcuts, automations).
settings.tokenCreated: Token created — copy it now! It won't be shown again.
settings.tokenRevokeDescription: The token will be permanently deactivated. Applications using it will lose access.
settings.apiEndpointsDescription: Overview of currently available external endpoint(s) for token-based ingestion.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Deletes all your health data and integrations. Your user account will be preserved.
settings.dangerZoneConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all your health data and integrations. Your user account will be preserved.
settings.dangerZoneSuccess: All personal data has been deleted
settings.adminAreaDescription: System-wide settings and user management are available in the admin console.
settings.moodLogWebhookSecretHelp: Enter this secret in moodLog as webhook secret
settings.moodLogFullSyncDescription: All available mood data will be fully synchronized.
settings.moodLogDisconnectDescription: The connection will be removed and all imported mood data will be deleted.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: System status, users, and settings
admin.registrationEnabledDescription: When disabled, new users cannot register.
admin.defaultLanguageDescription: Used for new users and as fallback.
admin.servicesGlobalDescription: Disabled services are not available to any user.
admin.apiGlobal: Allow API endpoints and API tokens system-wide.
admin.monitoringDescription: Configuration for website analytics and error tracking.
admin.webPushVapidDescription: Configure VAPID keys and subject here so browser push works without environment variables.
admin.webPushVapidPrivateKeyPlaceholder: Optional: enter a new private key
admin.bugReportGithubDescription: Configure GitHub issue token and repository for incoming bug reports.
admin.bugReportNotConfigured: Bug report is not fully configured yet.
admin.deleteAllDescription: Deletes all measurement, medication, integration, and log data for all users. User accounts will be preserved.
admin.deleteAllConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all measurements, medications, intake records, and integration data for all users. User accounts will be preserved.
admin.medicationRemindersDescription: Thresholds for reminder badge color transitions on medication cards.
admin.reminderLateMinutesDescription: Minutes after window end until the badge changes from yellow to orange.
admin.reminderMissedMinutesDescription: Minutes after window end until the intake is considered missed.

bugreport.title: Bug Report
bugreport.subtitle: Send a bug report, feature request, or question. The server administrator will see your submission.
bugreport.loginRequired: Please sign in to report a bug.
bugreport.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the bug in detail. What did you do? What happened? What did you expect?
bugreport.success: Thank you! Your bug report has been submitted successfully.
bugreport.notConfiguredUser: Bug reporting is disabled on this server. Please contact your administrator.
bugreport.notConfiguredAdmin: Bug reporting requires a GitHub integration (issue token + repository). Configure it in the admin panel under Settings → Bug reports.
bugreport.githubEscalationNote: Your feedback is stored locally. If the admin enables GitHub integration, it can be promoted to a public issue on request.
bugreport.internalOnlyNote: Your feedback is stored locally and only visible to the administrator of this server.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which notifications you want to receive through which channel.
notifications.noChannels: Configure a notification channel in Settings first.
notifications.eventMedicationReminderDesc: Reminder when an intake is due.
notifications.eventMeasurementAnomalyDesc: Warning for unusual measurements (e.g., high blood pressure).
notifications.eventComplianceLowDesc: Notification when medication compliance drops below a threshold.
notifications.eventWithingsSyncFailedDesc: Alert when the automatic Withings data sync fails.
notifications.eventSystemAlertDesc: Important system messages and administrative notices.

alerts.bmiBelowNormalMessage: Your BMI of {bmi} is below the normal range (18.5–24.9).
alerts.bmiOverweightMessage: Your BMI of {bmi} is in the overweight range. Regular exercise and a balanced diet can help.
alerts.bmiObesityMessage: Your BMI of {bmi} is in the obesity range.
alerts.bmiNormalMessage: Your BMI of {bmi} is in the healthy range.
alerts.bpDangerMessage: Your average blood pressure ({sys}/{dia}) is classified as "{category}".
alerts.bpWarningMessage: Your average blood pressure ({sys}/{dia}) is in the "{category}" range.
alerts.bpTargetGoodMessage: {pct}% of your readings are within the target range.
alerts.bpTargetBadTitle: Blood pressure often outside target range
alerts.bpTargetBadMessage: Only {pct}% of your readings are within the target range.
alerts.weightIncreasingMessage: Your weight is increasing by approx. {change} kg per week over the last 30 days.
alerts.weightDecreasingMessage: Your weight is decreasing by approx. {change} kg per week over the last 30 days.
alerts.pulseOutliersMessage: {count} unusual pulse readings in the last 30 days.
alerts.complianceLowMessage: Your 7-day compliance for {name} is only {pct}%. Regular intake is important.
alerts.complianceGoodMessage: {pct}% compliance over the last 7 days. Keep it up!

targets.title: Targets
targets.introText: Your current values compared to recommended target ranges. Guideline sources are linked on each card.
targets.noMeasurementData: No measurement data available. Add some measurements to see your targets.
targets.profileIncompleteHeight: Add your height in profile settings to enable BMI targets.
targets.profileIncompleteAge: Add your date of birth in profile settings for age-specific targets.
targets.profileIncompleteHeightAge: Add your height and date of birth in profile settings for personalized targets.

telegram.askMedicationName: Please specify a medication, e.g. taken Ramipril.
telegram.medicationNotFoundExact: Medication not found. Please send the name exactly as in HealthLog.
telegram.helpBody: /help — show this help /add — record an intake /start — start the bot Text commands: taken <name> — confirm an intake Buttons in reminders: • Taken — confirm intake • 🕐 1h / 🕐 3h — postpone reminder • ⏭ Skip — skip intake • ✓ Confirm — confirm a missed intake
